summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system failed to complete the task because it repeatedly reran similar web searches and effectively reset its plan multiple times, while only weakly verifying sources (finding general 2019 ridership and schedule pages but no train-specific May 27, 2019 ridership data) before ending with “Unable to determine based on available information.”

A. Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system failed to complete the task because it repeatedly reran similar web searches and effectively reset its plan multiple times, while only weakly verifying sources (finding general 2019 ridership and schedule pages but no train-specific May 27, 2019 ridership data) before ending with “Unable to determine based on available information.”
